title: BTC/USD just bounced exactly where it had to — 2.51 RR, no guessing
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Bitcoin was in freefall this morning.

Everyone was panic selling. I was watching one level.

Here's what the structure was showing on the 1H : — Clear demand zone untested since the previous push — EMA 200 sitting right below as dynamic support — Price compressing inside the zone — sellers losing steam — No lower high confirmed yet — invalidation was clean

Setup defined before entry : Stop : $950 risk / 1.27% Target : $2,387 / 3.18% RR : 2.51

Didn't predict the bounce. Just let the structure do the work.

BTC dropping and you're seeing setups or sitting on hands today?

comments.author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
comments.body:
Been running all three of these setups (XAU +$135 RR 2.15, EUR/USD +$214 RR 3.15, BTC RR 2.51) through an AI tool I've been building.

You upload a chart screenshot, it reads the structure, identifies the key zones and scores the setup before you enter. Not a signal service — just a second pair of eyes.

Free to try : [https://herculmarket.com](https://herculmarket.com)
